summary: A stellar matrix capture of the May‑8‑1977 show, highlighted by a blistering Scarlet > Fire and soaring Morning Dew.
review: The recording is praised for its crystal‑clear matrix balance and buttery soundstage, making every instrument shine. Musically the concert is hailed as one of ’77’s finest – the second set delivers a perfect Scarlet > Fire, an incendiary Morning Dew and nonstop dancing on Dancin', with the first set solid throughout. Fans repeatedly note the exceptional energy and tight playing across the whole night.

ai_rating.rationale: Overwhelmingly positive commentary on both performance (standout songs, tight playing) and recording quality (excellent matrix sound), with many detailed reviews supporting a high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Consistently described as crisp, balanced and buttery; listeners note beautiful instrument separation and no reported drop‑outs or muffiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set is solid with a spectacular Loser and a long, jam‑rich Dancin', while the second set flows flawlessly through Scarlet > Fire into an unforgettable Morning Dew; transitions are praised as seamless.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight Jerry’s “nice slidin'” moments and perfect guitar tone.
